full_text:
Shi Huang 史璜
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shi Huang (史璜). His death caused conflict as the Han ordered Shi Xie to defeat Liu Biao’s replacements. Shi Huang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Shi Huang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
